sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.description: Updates an existing warranty claim record with agent decision, recommendation, and other field changes.
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.inputs: [{"name":"record_number","value":"","description":"The claim number to update","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"agent_decision","value":"","description":"Agent decision: APPROVE, DENY, or ESCALATE","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"agent_recommendation","value":"","description":"Full step-by-step reasoning for the decision","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"state","value":"","description":"New state for the claim","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"warranty_details","value":"","description":"Warranty coverage details from API","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"warranty_expiry","value":"","description":"Warranty expiry date from API","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"device_name","value":"","description":"Device name from API","mandatory":false,"invalidMessage":null},{"name":"crudInputs","value":{"operation":"update","table":{"value":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim","displayValue":"x_snc_medwc_auto_0_warranty_claim"},"query":"number={{record_number}}","fieldValues":[{"field":{"id":"agent_decision","sublabel":"agent_decision","excludedOperators":[],"label":"agent_decision","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"agent_decision"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{agent_decision}}"}},{"field":{"id":"agent_recommendation","sublabel":"agent_recommendation","excludedOperators":[],"label":"agent_recommendation","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"agent_recommendation"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{agent_recommendation}}"}},{"field":{"id":"state","sublabel":"state","excludedOperators":[],"label":"state","type":"choice","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"state"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{state}}"}},{"field":{"id":"warranty_details","sublabel":"warranty_details","excludedOperators":[],"label":"warranty_details","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"warranty_details"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{warranty_details}}"}},{"field":{"id":"warranty_expiry","sublabel":"warranty_expiry","excludedOperators":[],"label":"warranty_expiry","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"warranty_expiry"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{warranty_expiry}}"}},{"field":{"id":"device_name","sublabel":"device_name","excludedOperators":[],"label":"device_name","type":"string","dictionaryAttributes":[],"name":"device_name"},"value":{"fieldValue":"{{device_name}}"}}]},"description":"Update operation configuration","mandatory":true,"invalidMessage":null}]
sn_aia_agent_tool_m2m.name: Update Warranty Claim Record
